frameworks.name: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria
frameworks.version: 2017 TSC with revised points of focus 2022
frameworks.official_source_name: AICPA & CIMA 2017 Trust Services Criteria (With Revised Points of Focus - 2022)
frameworks.copyright_guardrail: Do not reproduce licensed criteria text. Store local control IDs, short internal titles, evidence requirements, and official source references only.

frameworks.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
frameworks.official_source_name: NIST Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
frameworks.copyright_guardrail: NIST AI RMF is public NIST guidance. Prefer citations to the official NIST publication page and avoid implying certification.

frameworks.name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Information security management systems
frameworks.copyright_guardrail: ISO standard text is licensed; reproduce only control identifiers and short internal titles. Customers must hold their own license for the official PDF.

frameworks.name: HIPAA Security Rule (45 CFR Parts 160, 162, 164)
frameworks.copyright_guardrail: US federal regulation text is in the public domain. Cite the CFR section directly (e.g., 45 CFR §164.312(b)).

frameworks.name: PCI DSS v4.0 Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard
frameworks.official_source_name: PCI Security Standards Council — PCI DSS v4.0
frameworks.copyright_guardrail: PCI DSS document is licensed by PCI SSC. Store only requirement IDs and short internal titles; never reproduce normative text.

frameworks.name: GDPR — EU General Data Protection Regulation (2016/679)
frameworks.copyright_guardrail: EU regulation text is in the public domain via EUR-Lex. Cite article IDs directly (e.g., Art. 32 GDPR).

frameworks.name: EU AI Act — Regulation (EU) 2024/1689
frameworks.copyright_guardrail: EU regulation text is in the public domain via EUR-Lex. Cite article IDs directly (e.g., Art. 9 AI Act).

frameworks.name: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 AI management system
frameworks.copyright_guardrail: ISO standard text is licensed; reproduce only clause identifiers and short internal titles. Customers must hold their own license for the official PDF.
